---
title: "Working Paper"
description: "Site page for the public Lincoln/Gettysburg working paper."
---

The historical working paper is public with disclosed limitations. It is not a
journal-final, quotation-final, or limitation-free publication.

::: {.callout-important title="Working-paper status"}
Several quotation-final checks remain before a stronger publication claim
should be made. The public package preserves those limits in the publication
audit, evidence appendix, and source reviews.
:::

## Read The Paper

- [Open the full HTML working paper](outputs/paper.html)
- [Download the PDF working paper](outputs/paper.pdf)

## Supporting Materials

- [How the project worked](workflow.html)
- [Evidence table](evidence.html)
- [Audit and review results](reviews/)
- [Publication audit](publication-audit.html)
- [Reproducibility report](reproducibility-report.html)

## Why This Page Exists

The full HTML paper is a rendered publication artifact. This page keeps readers
inside the project website header and navigation before sending them to that
artifact. The GitHub repository link is available in the site header.
